impact: review_code and review_precommit currently reject diffs that don't include unified-diff hunks via looksLikeDiff (src/codex/client.ts) — which means binary-only diffs and rename-only diffs (which carry `diff --git` headers but no `@@` markers) are misclassified as 'not a diff' and refused. The user gets an INVALID_INPUT error even though git produced a valid diff. Surfaced during a pre-1.0.0 implementation review as a deferred medium issue. Fix shape: relax looksLikeDiff to accept `diff --git` + `Binary files` or `rename from/to` lines as valid, OR allow these through as a no-op chunk that doesn't need review. Not blocking 1.0.0; tracked for 1.0.x.
title: Binary and rename-only diffs rejected as 'not a diff'
